nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's Industry Reach: Unreleased Tracks with Anderson Paak and Kilo Kish
nuggets.text: Beyond his acclaimed solo releases, Pete Rango holds a deep catalog of unreleased material, having penned songs and demos with a roster of A-list talent including Anderson Paak, Kilo Kish, and Foushee. This prolific behind-the-scenes work highlights his influence as both a writer and producer, extending far beyond his own spotlight.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: Over the years, he has had songs and demos with artists including Anderson Paak, Kilo Kish, Father, KeithCharles (from Awful Records), Mr. Vegas, Aaron Doh, Kendyle Paige, and Foushee

nuggets.imageCaption: Pete Rango in the studio, a multi-instrumentalist producer.

nuggets.headline: From 'In Alcatraz 1962' to 'Savage Planet': Pete Rango's Self-Taught Production Mastery
nuggets.text: Pete Rango's journey into full-stack production was sparked by his high school metal band, In Alcatraz 1962, where the desire to record and mix their own records became a crucial catalyst. This early DIY ambition evolved in college as he embraced electronic music and mashups, shaping the genre-bending, self-produced sound heard on records like 'Savage Planet'.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: His experience with In Alcatraz 1962 was the catalyst for him wanting to learn how to record, mix, and produce his own records... During college, he discovered electronic music and became interested in mashups and mixing different genres

nuggets.imageCaption: Oms at Play by Pete Rango

nuggets.headline: If 'Oms at Play' has you hooked, dive into KAYTRANADA's soulful, genre-bending house.
nuggets.text: Pete Rango's knack for fusing pop, indie, and dancehall with electronic flair finds a spiritual kin in KAYTRANADA. Both artists are masters of crafting infectious grooves, seamlessly blending house, R&B, and hip-hop into a sophisticated, danceable sound that consistently pushes stylistic boundaries.

source.title: rush | PETE RANGO
source.quoteSnippet: His music is characterized by an alluring fusion of pop, indie pop, and dancehall

nuggets.imageCaption: KAYTRANADA, known for his signature blend of house and R&B.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is a Colombian artist, producer, and culture-builder renowned for his alluring fusion of pop, indie pop, and dancehall. Based in Richmond, Virginia, he actively builds communities, champions a DIY spirit, and develops emerging artists through L.I.V. Corp and XUE Records.
